chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5269 of 2017 CP D 4753 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.21986/2017 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Jawed Hussain advocate holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, provisional release has already taken place herein, however, finalization of the GDs is pending due to these petitions. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper to dispose off these petitions with directions that the GDs be finalize by the respondent department, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner in accordance with law. Learned counsel for respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid. Both these petitions are disposed off as aforesaid. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
